content.value: 2026-06-16 Codex reviewed commit c4b7f9a agentX ACA memory layer. Verdict: conditional green; tests passed with UV_CACHE_DIR=/private/tmp/agentx-uv-cache (ruff clean, pytest -k memory/doctor/loop/cli 38 passed). Main required fixes before next slice: MemoryWriteTool must not silently fall back to legacy write when ACA write/validation fails; write_aca should include AMH memhall adapter-compatible metadata keys source_type/source_ref/source_tier because current nested metadata.source.tier will be read back as default llm_derived by AMH memhall adapter; add unit tests for write_aca payload and MemoryWriteTool failure behavior. Existing untracked files ignored: .agentx/learning/ and scripts/simple_crawler.py.
